name: arbiter-forge
description: Forge, validate, and persist runnable multimodel task bundles with optional root-to-root workspace coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Build and save runnable multimodel arbiter tasks.
interface.longDescription: Arbiter Forge turns a normalized objective into a deterministic, self-contained orchestration prompt with role-oriented model/provider fallbacks, validates its provenance, and persists it as an ignored repository-local task bundle with goal-backed Codex App or same-agent handoff. An independent opt-in skill coordinates root tasks that contend for shared workspace or runtime resources without turning MCP into a scheduler.
defaultPrompt: Use Arbiter Forge to produce, validate, and materialize the smallest sufficient hard-arbiter task for my objective, then give me artifact links and explicit Codex App or same-agent execution instructions.
